1.title: Your dashboard
1.body: Sections adapt to your day. Pull down to refresh.
1.childBody: This is your main page! Everything important is here.

2.title: Quick add
2.body: This button lets you create a task, appointment, or journal entry in one tap.
2.childBody: Tap here to add something new!

3.title: Everything else
3.body: Meals, pantry, budget, routines… Find all features here.

1.title: Manage your tasks
1.body: Check off a task to earn points. Swipe left to delete.
1.childBody: Complete your missions to earn points!

2.title: Filter by person
2.body: Tap a name to see only their tasks.

1.title: Your appointments
1.body: Tap an appointment to view details, add questions, or a summary.

2.title: Quick search
2.body: Find an appointment by doctor name or specialty.

1.title: Daily journal
1.body: Select a child then fill in the sections: meals, sleep, diapers, mood.

2.title: Quick tracking
2.body: Each section updates instantly. Stats are calculated automatically.

1.title: Family album
1.body: Add a photo each day to build a memory album. Photos stay on your device.

1.title: Meal planner
1.body: Tap a slot (lunch/dinner) to add a dish. Ingredients are added to the shopping list automatically.

2.title: From recipes
2.body: Pick directly from your recipe book to fill the planner.

1.title: Pantry tracker
1.body: When stock drops below the threshold, the item is automatically added to the shopping list.

1.title: Monthly budget
1.body: Set a spending cap and track expenses by category. The total updates in real time.

1.title: Daily routines
1.body: Create morning/evening routines for the whole family. Each completion earns points.
1.childBody: Your morning and evening routines are here!

1.title: Rewards
1.body: Complete tasks to earn points and unlock chests. Each chest holds a surprise!
1.childBody: Finish your missions to open surprise chests!

1.title: Family challenges
1.body: Challenge the family: "7 days screen-free", "Tidy room all week"…
1.childBody: Take on challenges to earn bonus points!

1.title: All your features
1.body: Each card opens a section of the app. Badges show pending actions.
1.childBody: All the app's features are here!

1.title: Skill tree
1.body: Track each child's progress by category. Parents validate acquired skills.
1.childBody: See all your skills! Ask a parent to validate the ones you've mastered.
